creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm not fixing this -- this is a problem at the KDE Team's end.  I'm 
pretty sure KDE2.1 will compile fine with QT >= 2.2.2, but make no guarantees 
except if you are using the absolute latest QT2/KDE2 ports.  That's the 
price of code that uses green GCC C++ code.
